name: koishi-plugin-ll-keyword-reply
description: Flexible keyword-auto-reply with regex, per-group, weekday scheduling

description.zh: 关键词自动回复。设置页表格管理规则，支持正则/包含、分群覆盖、星期调度、图片回复，命令添加删除。
description.en: Keyword auto-reply. Settings page table, regex/contains, per-group overrides, weekday schedule, commands.
